message:
feat(abi-tests): add grp reentrant concurrency and iconv encoding tests

- grp: add concurrent getgrnam_r and getgrgid_r lookups from 4 threads
- grp: add getgrnam_r with 64KB buffer to verify large-buffer path
- iconv: add Latin-1 → UTF-8 conversion (café round-trip)
- iconv: add UTF-8 → UTF-8 passthrough and same-encoding open/close
- iconv: add ASCII alias open (graceful unsupported handling)
- iconv: add UTF-8 multi-byte (Euro sign) → UTF-16LE conversion

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
